languages.text: "Фиксирую высокий уровень здравомыслия в озвученном решении". {n}Паскаль едва заметно кланяется.{/n} "Последствия сбоя и нерелевантных решений генетора Фебруса будут немедленно устранены, а функционирование машинных духов корабля — оптимизировано согласно священным протоколам".

"I am registering a high level of sound judgement in the stated decision." {n}Pasqal bows almost imperceptibly.{/n} "The consequences of Genetor Februs's malfunction and irrelevant decisions will be rectified immediately, and the functioning of the ship's machine spirits will be optimised according to sacred protocols."
languages.original_text: "Фиксирую высокий уровень здравомыслия в озвученном решении". {n}Паскаль едва заметно кланяется.{/n} "Последствия сбоя и нерелевантных решений генетора Фебруса будут немедленно устранены, а функционирование машинных духов корабля — оптимизировано согласно священным протоколам".

"I am registering a high level of sound judgement in the stated decision." {n}Pasqal bows almost imperceptibly.{/n} "The consequences of Genetor Februs's malfunction and irrelevant decisions will be rectified immediately, and the functioning of the ship's machine spirits will be optimised according to sacred protocols."

languages.text: "Ich registriere in der Entscheidung ein hohes Maß an Urteilsvermögen." {n}Pasqal verbeugt sich fast unmerklich.{/n} "Die Konsequenzen der Fehlfunktionen und irrelevanten Entscheidungen von Genetor Februs werden umgehend berichtigt. Die Funktion der Maschinengeister des Schiffes wird im Einklang mit den heiligen Protokollen optimiert."
languages.original_text: "I am registering a high level of sound judgement in the stated decision." {n}Pasqal bows almost imperceptibly.{/n} "The consequences of Genetor Februs's malfunction and irrelevant decisions will be rectified immediately, and the functioning of the ship's machine spirits will be optimised according to sacred protocols."

traits.locale_text: "Ich registriere in der Entscheidung ein hohes Maß an Urteilsvermögen." {n}Pasqal verbeugt sich fast unmerklich.{/n} "Die Konsequenzen der Fehlfunktionen und irrelevanten Entscheidungen von Genetor Februs werden umgehend berichtigt. Die Funktion der Maschinengeister des Schiffes wird im Einklang mit den heiligen Protokollen optimiert."

languages.text: « J'enregistre que la décision rendue présente un grand bon sens. » {n}Pasqal s'incline presque imperceptiblement.{/n} « Les conséquences du dysfonctionnement et des décisions inappropriées du genetor Februs seront immédiatement corrigées, et le fonctionnement des esprits de la machine du vaisseau sera optimisé conformément aux protocoles sacrés. »
languages.original_text: "I am registering a high level of sound judgement in the stated decision." {n}Pasqal bows almost imperceptibly.{/n} "The consequences of Genetor Februs's malfunction and irrelevant decisions will be rectified immediately, and the functioning of the ship's machine spirits will be optimised according to sacred protocols."

traits.locale_text: « J'enregistre que la décision rendue présente un grand bon sens. » {n}Pasqal s'incline presque imperceptiblement.{/n} « Les conséquences du dysfonctionnement et des décisions inappropriées du genetor Februs seront immédiatement corrigées, et le fonctionnement des esprits de la machine du vaisseau sera optimisé conformément aux protocoles sacrés. »

languages.text: “我正在记录这项决定中所蕴含的极高判断力。”{n}帕斯卡微微躬身。{/n}“我将立即纠正基因士费布鲁斯因故障而做出的不当决策，并依据神圣协议优化舰船机魂的运作。”
languages.original_text: "I am registering a high level of sound judgement in the stated decision." {n}Pasqal bows almost imperceptibly.{/n} "The consequences of Genetor Februs's malfunction and irrelevant decisions will be rectified immediately, and the functioning of the ship's machine spirits will be optimised according to sacred protocols."

traits.locale_text: “我正在记录这项决定中所蕴含的极高判断力。”{n}帕斯卡微微躬身。{/n}“我将立即纠正基因士费布鲁斯因故障而做出的不当决策，并依据神圣协议优化舰船机魂的运作。”

languages.text: «Registro un elevado nivel de buen juicio en la decisión emitida». {n}Pasqal hace una reverencia apenas perceptible.{/n} «Las consecuencias de la avería y las decisiones irrelevantes del genetor Februs se rectificarán de inmediato y el funcionamiento de los espíritus máquina de la nave se optimizará conforme los protocolos sagrados».
languages.original_text: "I am registering a high level of sound judgement in the stated decision." {n}Pasqal bows almost imperceptibly.{/n} "The consequences of Genetor Februs's malfunction and irrelevant decisions will be rectified immediately, and the functioning of the ship's machine spirits will be optimised according to sacred protocols."

traits.locale_text: «Registro un elevado nivel de buen juicio en la decisión emitida». {n}Pasqal hace una reverencia apenas perceptible.{/n} «Las consecuencias de la avería y las decisiones irrelevantes del genetor Februs se rectificarán de inmediato y el funcionamiento de los espíritus máquina de la nave se optimizará conforme los protocolos sagrados».

languages.text: "私は、記載された決定に高いレベルの健全な判断を登録します"{n}パスカールはほとんど気づかないほどお辞儀をする。{/n}"ジェネター・フェブリュスの誤動作と無関係な決断の結果は直ちに修正され、神聖なプロトコルに従って船のマシンスピリットの機能が最適化されます"
languages.original_text: "I register a high level of sound judgment in the stated decision." {n}Pasqal bows almost imperceptibly.{/n} "The consequences of Genetor Februs's malfunction and irrelevant decisions will be rectified immediately, and the functioning of the ship's machine spirits will be optimised according to sacred protocols."

languages.text: "Belirtilen kararda yüksek düzeyde sağduyu saptıyorum." {n}Pasqal, neredeyse fark edilmeyecek kadar eğiliyor.{/n} "Genetör Februs'un arızasının ve yersiz kararlarının sonuçları derhâl düzeltilecek ve geminin makine ruhlarının işleyişi, kutsal protokollere göre optimize edilecektir."
languages.original_text: "I am registering a high level of sound judgement in the stated decision." {n}Pasqal bows almost imperceptibly.{/n} "The consequences of Genetor Februs's malfunction and irrelevant decisions will be rectified immediately, and the functioning of the ship's machine spirits will be optimised according to sacred protocols."

traits.locale_text: "Belirtilen kararda yüksek düzeyde sağduyu saptıyorum." {n}Pasqal, neredeyse fark edilmeyecek kadar eğiliyor.{/n} "Genetör Februs'un arızasının ve yersiz kararlarının sonuçları derhâl düzeltilecek ve geminin makine ruhlarının işleyişi, kutsal protokollere göre optimize edilecektir."
